description: Inventory item schema for L1521 lab inventory. Single-sheet structure from V5 onward.

field_notes.Item_ID: Stable key - never change. Format: CHM-0001, ABP-0001, PRD-0001
field_notes.Subcategory: See subcategory tree in Excel dropdown list
field_notes.CAS_No: Chemicals and applicable Products items only. Used for auto MSDS lookup via PubChem. Read-only.
field_notes.Application: Semicolon-separated in Excel/CSV (e.g. WB;Cell Culture). Stored as list in JSON.
field_notes.Location: Yellow Cabinet / Cabinet / Fridge / Fridge 2 / Freezer / Freezer 2
field_notes.Sub_Location: Shelf 1-4 for cabinets/fridges/freezers. Box name (e.g. CST #1) for Fridge 2 / Freezer 2.
field_notes.Order_Unit: What one order unit is — used by order generator (e.g. 500mL, 1 box)
field_notes.Current_Stock: Number of units currently on hand. Null if unknown.
field_notes.Low_Stock: Boolean. TRUE if flagged as running low.
field_notes.MSDS_URL: Manual URL fallback if CAS auto-fetch fails.
field_notes.Cat_No: Read-only after first entry — do not change.

Freezer 2: box name e.g. CST #1, CST #2, CST #3, CST #4

workflow.bulk_edit: Edit Inventory_Master_V*.xlsx → python scripts/convert_excel_to_json.py <input.xlsx> data/inventory.json → commit to GitHub
workflow.single_edit: Edit via site UI → Export JSON → replace data/inventory.json → commit to GitHub
workflow.new_items: Add row to Excel with next available Item_ID, or use + Add item on site

notes: Item_ID is the stable merge key — never change it.
Cat_No and CAS_No are read-only after first entry.
GitHub Pages is static — edits save to browser localStorage. Export JSON and commit to update the team.
MSDS auto-links via PubChem using CAS_No. Add MSDS_URL manually for items without CAS.
MW_kDa retained for Antibody/Protein items only.
